title: Sound of Falling
synopsis: Spanning a century, four girls from different eras — Alma, Erika, Angelika and Lenka, — spend their childhoods and youth on the same remote farmstead in northern Germany. Though separated by time, the anxieties of growing up and, the looming presence of death echo across their lives, awakening buried traumas throughout the 20th century, from the shadows of the World Wars to the isolation of the East German era.  - Winner of the Jury Prize at Cannes film festival.

synopsis_lang.en: Spanning a century, four girls from different eras — Alma, Erika, Angelika and Lenka, — spend their childhoods and youth on the same remote farmstead in northern Germany. Though separated by time, the anxieties of growing up and, the looming presence of death echo across their lives, awakening buried traumas throughout the 20th century, from the shadows of the World Wars to the isolation of the East German era.  - Winner of the Jury Prize at Cannes film festival.
synopsis_lang.zh_hk: 在德國一座偏遠農莊，橫跨一整個世紀，四位少女—艾瑪、艾麗加、安祖妮加、寧卡，在不同時代度過青春。面對成長的騷動與不安、死亡的威脅與好奇，她們的故事雖然相隔，卻如鬼魅般迴盪，喚醒潛意識裏的創傷，影像與時光疊映消融，輕輕拂過二十世紀初、籠罩二戰時期、延展至東德時代，縈繞至今。陰暗的故事隨河流潺潺躍動，泛起陣陣漣漪。它曾是少女游泳嬉戲的河、逃離強暴的河，象徵邊界的河......映照出女性在這百年間承受的凝視與束縛。德國新銳女導演瑪莎施林斯基打破線性敘事，將記憶碎片拼湊成德國百年失落歷史的拼圖，詩意而冷冽的鏡頭語言，如流水般輕柔卻又暗藏波瀾，榮獲康城影展評審團獎。

cast: Hanna Heckt, Lena Urzendowsky, Laeni Geiseler, Lea Drinda

cast_lang.en: Hanna Heckt, Lena Urzendowsky, Laeni Geiseler, Lea Drinda
cast_lang.zh_hk: 漢娜赫克特、萊娜烏澤多夫斯基、拉妮佳士拿、莉亞德林達
